description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a dependency_scanning job in the test stage using the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service. Set variables DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR='' and allow the job to fail without breaking the pipeline. The job runs only on branch refs and when $GITLAB_FEATURES matches the regex /\bdependency_scanning\b/, and it is excluded if the variable $DEPENDENCY_SCANNING_DISABLED is set. It executes the script steps: export DS_VERSION=${SP_VERSION:-$(echo "$CI_SERVER_VERSION" | sed 's/^([0-9]*)\.([0-9]*).*/\1-\2-stable/')}, conditionally set DOCKER_HOST if Docker is not reachable, define a propagate_env_vars function that echoes "--env VAR_NAME" for each listed variable, and finally run docker run $(propagate_env_vars ...) --volume "$PWD:/code" --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock "registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/dependency-scanning:$DS_VERSION" /code. The job publishes a dependency_scanning artifact report gl-dependency-scanning-report.json.
